entities.name: Decision Matrix
entities.context: A framework for determining software refactoring strategy based on preservability percentages

entities.name: Refactor
entities.context: A strategy for modifying existing code while retaining its behavior

entities.name: Rewrite
entities.context: A strategy to create a new version of software from scratch

entities.name: wrapper
entities.context: A technique or tool used to adapt existing code

relationships.context: Refactor is one of the actions derived from the Decision Matrix
Rewrite is one of the actions derived from the Decision Matrix
wrapper is a potential approach mentioned within the Decision Matrix context
